name: JUVENILE XANTHOGRANULOMA
definition: relatively benign non-LCH dendritic cell disorder of early childhood
discriminating_features: infiltrative nonenhancing mass of intermediate T1 signal
well-defined medullary lytic lesion with sclerotic margins

Soft tissue: infiltrative nonenhancing mass of intermediate T1 signal
Bone: well-defined medullary lytic lesion with sclerotic margins
